title: penstemon schaffneri
intro: Penstemon schaffneri, also known as Schaffner's penstemon or beard tongue, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This perennial plant, belonging to the snapdragon family, is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which can be utilized to treat various health conditions. The plant's leaves and roots have been traditionally used to treat sore throats, coughs, and respiratory issues, as well as to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Penstemon schaffneri include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support immune function and provide relief from various health complaints.
